turns.content: What brings you in today?
My left arm hurts real bad and I'm sweating like crazy. I'm scared it might be a heart attack.
When did this start?
Started maybe an hour ago, during my last delivery. Still hurts now.
Can you describe the pain or discomfort? Where exactly do you feel it?
It's mostly in my left arm, like a heavy ache. And my chest feels tight too, like something's squeezing it.
Have you had any fever or chills?
No, just the sweating and the arm hurting.
What medications are you currently taking?
Just some blood pressure pills my regular doc gave me. That's it.
Do you have any chronic medical conditions?
High blood pressure, I think. The doc said it's a bit high.
Are you allergic to any medications?
I don't think so. Nothing happened before when they gave me pills.
Have you tried anything to relieve the symptoms?
No, I just stopped the truck and sat here. Didn't know what else to do.
Does anything make it better or worse?
Not really. It just stays the same whether I'm sitting or moving.
How has this been affecting your daily life?
I had to stop my run. Can't drive with this. I'm just sitting here scared.
Do you smoke or drink alcohol?
Yeah, I smoke. Drink some beer, too. Not a lot though.
Has anyone in your family had similar problems?
My dad had heart trouble. Died of a heart attack when he was 50.
Have you experienced anything like this before?
No. Never felt like this before. Just the usual tiredness after long drives.
I've explained quite a bit — does that make sense so far?
Yeah, sure, doc. I get it.
On a scale of 1 to 10, how would you rate what you're going through right now — physically, and also emotionally?
Uh, physically maybe a 7 or 8. Emotionally... like a 9. I'm real scared.
Do you have any questions for me?
No, just tell me what to do. Whatever you think is best, doc.
What do you think might be going on?
I don't know, doc. That's why I came here. Just tell me what's going on.
Is there anything else you think I should know?
No. That's pretty much it. Just fix me up, please.
